name: AiSOC — AI SOC cases / alerts / IOCs / detections
description: Imports from AiSOC (github.com/beenuar/AiSOC, MIT) — the open-source, self-hostable AI Security Operations Center (alert fusion, four LangGraph agents Detect/Triage/Hunt/Respond, OCSF-normalized alerts, cases, MITRE ATT&CK investigation, risk-based alerting, detection-as-code). One import feeds three XORCISM cockpits: AiSOC cases & alerts -> XINCIDENT.ALERT (incident / SOC), AiSOC IOCs + threat-actor attributions -> XTHREAT.INTELEXCHANGE (CTI; MITRE technique tags cross-link into the ATT&CK coverage matrix), and AiSOC detection rules -> XTHREAT.SIGMARULE (purple-team / threat-informed defense). Worker-safe & read-only: parse an exported AiSOC JSON, or set AISOC_URL + AISOC_API_KEY to pull read-only from the AiSOC API. No actions are sent back to AiSOC.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline: a saved AiSOC export JSON (cases / alerts / iocs / detections / actors). Omit to use AISOC_URL/AISOC_API_KEY, or the bundled sample.

parameters.name: kind
parameters.help: all | cases | alerts | iocs | detections — which AiSOC outputs to import

parameters.name: limit
parameters.help: Maximum items per category to import

parameters.name: min_severity
parameters.help: Only import alerts/IOCs at or above this severity (info|low|medium|high|critical). Default: info.
